name: capture_payment
description: Capture an authorized payment in Razorpay to complete the fund transfer. When auto-capture is disabled, payments remain in the 'authorized' state until you explicitly capture them. You must capture within 5 days or the authorization expires. You can capture a partial amount if needed.

parameters.name: payment_id
parameters.description: The ID of the authorized payment to capture (path parameter, starts with 'pay_').

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: The amount to capture in smallest currency unit. Must be equal to or less than the authorized amount.

parameters.name: currency
parameters.description: ISO 4217 currency code. Must match the payment's currency.
